user_query: Tell me everything about the companies behind my open support cases.

plan.query: Tell me everything about the companies behind my open support cases.
plan.reasoning: The query requires comprehensive information about the companies related to open support cases, thus involving all available agents to gather relevant details from different perspectives: communication history, CRM data on the companies, and their physical presence.

steps.task: Search for emails, calendar events, and OneDrive files mentioning the companies behind my open support cases. Include any communication history.
Find accounts for the companies behind my open support cases AND their contacts, ALL open opportunities, and any leads for these companies. Return everything in one response.
Search for locations matching the companies behind my open support cases. Try partial name matches if the exact name returns nothing. Also retrieve any catalog items if relevant.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results from all three steps to provide a complete overview of the companies behind the open support cases, including communication history, CRM data, and physical presence.

invoked_agents.input: Search for emails, calendar events, and OneDrive files mentioning the companies behind my open support cases. Include any communication history.
Search for locations matching the companies behind my open support cases. Try partial name matches if the exact name returns nothing. Also retrieve any catalog items if relevant.
Find accounts for the companies behind my open support cases AND their contacts, ALL open opportunities, and any leads for these companies. Return everything in one response.
